calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause on calendar for a Small Claims Appeal
Judge Pro Tem: Steve Weber, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (525)

9:10 am
Matter on calendar is called.

9:15 am
10 minute recess is called for exchange of exhibits

9:30am
Juliana Kresse, Esq. appears on behalf of Appellant California Public Utilities Commission.
Witness Rami Kahlon is sworn and testifies on behalf of the Appellant.
Respondent Peter Liu appears on his own behalf.
Respondent is sworn and examined.

Exhibits are identified and admitted into evidence

Appellant's Exhibit 1 - telecommuting policy

Respondent's Exhibit A - email
Respondent's Exhibit B - agreement
Respondent's Exhibit C - email reminder

Both Parties Exhibits are retained.

10:00 am
Matter is argued and submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Continued To Jun-27-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
